piiWhitelist.heading: Anonymization exceptions
piiWhitelist.description: In anonymous mode, Ayunis Core replaces detected personal data with placeholders before it is sent to the language model. Here you can exempt individual data types (e.g. names or emails) from anonymization — either entirely or only for specific values you define. Everything else is still masked.
piiWhitelist.patternHint: The pattern is a regular expression — the value must fully match it, case-insensitive. Leave empty to exempt the whole category.
piiWhitelist.invalidPattern: This pattern is not a valid regular expression.
piiWhitelist.patternTooLong: The pattern must not exceed {{max}} characters.
piiWhitelist.unsafePattern: This pattern was rejected because it could cause excessive processing time.
piiWhitelist.loadError: The anonymization exceptions could not be loaded.

person_name.label: Person names
person_name.description: First and last names of natural persons
person_name.example: exempts exactly this name. Use the | key to list several names.

organization.label: Organizations
organization.description: Names of companies, institutions, and public bodies
organization.example: exempts exactly this organization. Use the | key to list several organizations.

location.label: Locations & addresses
location.example: exempts exactly this location. Use the | key to list several locations.

email_address.label: Email addresses
email_address.example: exempts all email addresses ending in @muster-stadt.de. Use the | key to list several addresses.

phone_number.label: Phone numbers
phone_number.example: exempts all phone numbers with the area code 0681. Use the | key to list several numbers.

url_or_ip.label: URLs & IP addresses
url_or_ip.example: exempts all addresses containing muster-stadt.de. Use the | key to list several addresses.

date_time.label: Dates & times
date_time.description: Specific dates and times, e.g. dates of birth
date_time.example: exempts all four-digit numbers, e.g. years. Use the | key to list several values.

financial_account.label: Financial accounts
financial_account.description: Credit card numbers, IBANs, and bank account numbers
financial_account.example: exempts all IBANs starting with DE12. Use the | key to list several values.

government_id.label: Government IDs
government_id.description: Social security, passport, driver's license, and medical license numbers
government_id.example: exempts all values containing “muster”. Use the | key to list several values.

nationality_religion_politics.label: Nationality, religion & politics
nationality_religion_politics.description: References to nationality, religious, or political affiliation
nationality_religion_politics.example: exempts all values containing “muster”. Use the | key to list several values.

other.label: Other / unrecognized
other.description: Personal data detected by the engine that does not fit a known category
other.example: exempts all values containing “muster”. Use the | key to list several values.
